ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Tops, Dresses, Pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for a category image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent (e.g., 0, 2, 4, 6) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "rise" REAL /* Rise measurement in inches */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size belongs to */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "thigh" REAL /* Thigh measurement in inches */,
  "calf" REAL /* Calf measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for the main image of the clothing item */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the item is featured */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Status of the item's stock (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item size combination */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the specified size */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which the item should be reordered */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date the item was last restocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the item size combination was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the item size combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is being shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
